tips.text: Pick Version A and Version B JSON under Load JSON, then Compare Versions to refresh the Version Diff summary.
Load Sample pulls bundled sample-data/demo-v1.json into Version A for a quick first look.
Reset clears loaded versions, selections, custom paths, and related UI so you can start over.
Folder lists project-data/ from manifest.json; use + to open a local folder of JSON files, or URL to add a path or web address.
Filters, Master FX search, and Version Diff apply across Graph, Tree, Logic Flow, and Code views—including focus/full modes and toolbar exports.
Try demo-v1-1.json in A and demo-v1-2.json in B for a richer side-by-side compare.
Opening via file:// can block fetch or modules; serve this folder with a static HTTP server for reliable loading.
